queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Oracle VirtualBox %' AND publisher = 'Oracle and/or its affiliates';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Oracle VirtualBox %' AND publisher = 'Oracle and/or its affiliates' AND version_compare(version, '7.2.8') < 0);
